title: centaurea odessana
intro: Centaurea odessana, also known as Odessa knapweed, is a perennial plant belonging to the daisy family, Asteraceae. It is native to the steppes of Ukraine and has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is valued for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, which have been shown to have various health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antifungal activities. Centaurea odessana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use.
